name: api-offchain
description: Proyecto API off-chain para exponer datos complementarios de la blockchain.

scripts.generate: @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/offchain-api.yaml -g typescript-axios -o clients/typescript/src/api && @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/offchain-api.yaml -g go -o clients/go

author: Banco Central
